nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kai Besar white-eye
nodes.summary: Kai Besar white-eye（Zosterops grayi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Kai Besar white-eye。

nodes.name: 卡伊群島
nodes.summary: 卡伊群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Rufous-sided gerygone、帝汶鹃鵙、Australasian figbird等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Kai Besar white-eye
nodes.summary: The Kai Besar white-eye (Zosterops grayi), also known as the pearl-bellied white-eye, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is native to the Kai Islands in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
